CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(pro_Actual_Delivery_Date__c)), IMAGE("/resource/1727948760000/Green?", "Green",20,20), IF( pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c >= 30, IMAGE("/resource/1727948760000/Green?", "Green",20,20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c, 0)) & " days remaining", IF( AND(pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c > 0, pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c < 30), IMAGE("/resource/1727950613000/Yellow?", "Yellow",20,20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c, 0)) & " days remaining", IF( pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c <= 0, IMAGE("/resource/1727950641000/Red?", "Red",20,20) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(pro_Days_Left_To_Target_Contracting_Date__c, 0)) & " days overdue", "" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Days Left To Target Contracting Date
